Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.vintage" AS vintage, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 5) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/6448022d1f3b64a9b6baf3304d93f7837d546d24824ae32d288e187418a6dea1/6b14c5bd-3e8c-4443-b79f-68f40d050bbf/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
